embedding.title: Embedding
embedding.description: Provider and model for vector embedding and semantic search.
embedding.importance: Embedding is critical for memory recall, skill search, knowledge graph, and task matching accuracy. Changes affect the entire system.
embedding.providerTip: LLM provider used for generating text embeddings.
embedding.modelTip: Embedding model (e.g. text-embedding-3-small). Must support /embeddings endpoint.
embedding.supportedProviders: Verified 1536d: OpenAI (text-embedding-3-small/large), Gemini (gemini-embedding-001 + dimensions), Mistral (codestral-embed), Cohere (embed-v4), DashScope (text-embedding-v3 + dimensions). Configure dimensions in provider settings for models with native dims > 1536.
embedding.verifyRequired: Verify the embedding model before saving.

ux.title: UX Behavior
ux.description: Control how the gateway displays agent activity to users.
ux.toolStatusHint: Display the active tool name while the agent is running.
ux.toolStatusInfo: Tool names are shown in streaming preview while the agent runs.
ux.blockReply: Show intermediate text during tool calls
ux.blockReplyHint: Stream partial assistant text while tools are being invoked.
ux.blockReplyInfo: Intermediate text is streamed to users during tool execution.
ux.intentClassifyHint: Classify user intent before routing to the agent.
ux.intentClassifyInfo: Messages are classified to optimize agent routing and behavior.

compaction.title: Pending Message Compaction
compaction.description: Summarize long pending message history to stay within context limits.
compaction.info: When a group chat exceeds the threshold, the LLM automatically summarizes older messages into a single compact entry, keeping the most recent ones intact for context.
